intro_text: As r_c crosses a beach, shivering with the cold, {PRONOUN/r_c/subject} {VERB/r_c/hear/hears} a creaking, rushing sound, like a wave — but out of sync with the ocean.
decline_text: r_c decides to head back early.

success_outcomes.text: r_c leaps forward, dashing to the other side of the beach and up onto the rocks. {PRONOUN/r_c/subject/CAP} {VERB/r_c/make/makes} it in time to watch the beach get lost under a tide of water from inland.

s_c scrambles back the way {PRONOUN/s_c/subject} came and watches the beach disappear under a flood of water. It leaves behind a changed landscape, tons of debris — and a large dead sheep. s_c pounces on the opportunity to scavenge.

s_c shrieks at the strange sound, paws digging into the sand as {PRONOUN/s_c/subject} {VERB/s_c/turn/turns} and {VERB/s_c/run/runs} for home. {PRONOUN/s_c/subject/CAP} {VERB/s_c/are/is} proven right when the beach disappears under a flood of water from inland. {PRONOUN/s_c/poss/CAP} caution saved {PRONOUN/s_c/poss} life.

fail_outcomes.text: r_c is in the middle of the beach when the flood hits {PRONOUN/r_c/object}. Freezing water rushes from inland, sweeping {PRONOUN/r_c/object} straight out to sea to die in the cold ocean.

history_text.death: m_c was swept out to sea by a flood.

intro_text: p_l's patrol pads along the shore towards the border. A recent storm washed away some of the markers near the waterline and they need to be refreshed. There in the surf, however, they find a great wooden thing—a piece of a floating nest. Towering over the cats, its jagged edges jut out at broken angles. Beneath the salt, Twoleg scent lingers in the air.
decline_text: p_l decides to turn back to camp and report the encounter, rather than risk investigating something potentially dangerous.

success_outcomes.text: p_l investigates the interior of the washed-up floating nest. It appears to be lying on its side, with Twoleg stuff tumbled over and fallen in heaps. Giant, tough cobwebs lie next to a coil of thick, flexible vine. There is even a bright, shiny white-and-red striped ring, sized almost perfectly to nap within. But they have a task to do, and after noting the discovery, refresh the border markings without incident.

log.cats_from: cat_from witnessed p_l's calm assessment of a wrecked floating Twoleg nest and felt more secure afterward.

success_outcomes.text: With a deep, probing breath, s_c perks up. There's something else in there, beside the salt and Twoleg stench. Following {PRONOUN/s_c/poss} nose through the shaded debris, {PRONOUN/s_c/subject} eventually {VERB/s_c/sink/sinks} {PRONOUN/s_c/poss} teeth into one of the several still-fresh fishes, tangled in giant cobwebs inside. c_n will feast tonight!

log.cats_from: cat_from was impressed by s_c's keen senses and enjoyed sharing in the scavenged fishes from a wrecked floating Twoleg nest.

success_outcomes.text: s_c ambles inside, sticking {PRONOUN/s_c/poss} nose into the tangled debris. Searching for anything useful, {PRONOUN/s_c/subject} eventually {VERB/s_c/present/presents} p_l with a long, straight stick, colourful wrapping and caps adorning it. It's taller than a cat! This, stuck into the sand—as s_c soon demonstrates—will be an excellent border marker that no one can pretend to overlook.

log.cats_from: cat_from was impressed by s_c's ingenious border marker, scavenged from a wrecked floating Twoleg nest, and knows {PRONOUN/cat_from/subject} can rely on {PRONOUN/s_c/poss} resourcefulness.

success_outcomes.text: s_c stalks closer, then freezes, eyes trained on a twisted carcass half-pinned under the wreckage. A great serpentine fish lies with eyes glazed and empty, flies starting to crawl over its smooth scales. s_c trembles, watching the oarfish's characteristic long, draped antennae fan out and ride on the lapping waves. This is an omen, {PRONOUN/s_c/subject} {VERB/s_c/explain/explains} to p_l. Grave danger is coming, but if c_n prepares now, they can weather the storm.

log.cats_from: cat_from witnessed s_c interpret the dire omen of a washed-up oarfish and felt glad to have {PRONOUN/s_c/object} in the Clan.

fail_outcomes.text: There's something in there, tangled in with the debris and brightly-coloured Twoleg furs. As p_l takes a step towards it, the wind turns, and the scent of carrion intensifies. Avoiding the crowfood, the patrol quickly walks on... but wonders what it once was.

s_c confidently strolls inside, only to trip on a loose board and tumble into a pile of giant, Twoleg-made cobwebs! The sun has moved significantly by the time the patrol frees s_c, whose time spent wrapped up with rotting fishes has left its mark. The o_c_n patrol they encounter at the border a short while later is not amused and quickly departs upwind.

log.cats_from: cat_from didn't enjoy patrolling beside a s_c stinking of rotting fish due to {PRONOUN/s_c/poss} own carelessness. Or the looks {PRONOUN/cat_from/subject} got from a o_c_n patrol because of it.
